content_fingerprint: openai expands codex with scheduled automations and websocket powered agent workflows openai has released new codex capabilities including scheduled task automations and a websocket based responses api that cuts overhead in agentic loops making it practical to run recurring multi step workflows without manual triggers openai has published new documentation for codex automations a feature that lets users schedule tasks and set triggers to run recurring workflows such as automated reports summaries and routine data pulls without manual intervention the feature is accessible through the openai ac
